fsca_compliance_report.regulatory_compliance_statement: This report demonstrates JSE's compliance with FSCA Settlement Rules 2023, including proactive risk monitoring, conservative intervention thresholds, and comprehensive audit trails. All high-risk exposures have been identified and appropriate preventive measures recommended.
